summary: Iteration 187 COMPREHENSIVE End-to-End Test Complete - All 20 backend tests passed (100%), All frontend pages verified working

issues: 'Missing API Keys' modal appears on all pages - expected behavior warning about optional integrations (Heartbeat, Emailit, Cloudinary), does not block functionality

P0_REGRESSION_complete_onboarding.description: POST /api/profit/complete-onboarding accepts new trader payload with starting_balance field

P1_REGRESSION_admin_members.description: GET /api/admin/members returns member list with proper filtering

P1_REGRESSION_member_stats_overview.description: GET /api/admin/members/stats/overview returns active_members, team_leaders, suspended, in_danger stats

P1_REGRESSION_forum_status_filter.description: GET /api/forum/posts?status=open correctly filters posts (4 open, 2 solved)

P2_store_items.description: GET /api/store/items returns 3 immunity items (50/120/250 points) and user_points (429)

P2_store_purchase_insufficient.description: POST /api/store/purchase with insufficient points returns 400 with proper error

P2_store_purchase_valid.description: POST /api/store/purchase deducts 50 points and creates immunity credit

P2_store_my_credits.description: GET /api/store/my-credits returns active_credits and history arrays

P2_cleanup_overview.description: GET /api/admin/cleanup-overview returns all sections: pending_proofs=3, fraud_warnings=0, in_danger=0, auto_suspended=0, pending_registrations=0

P2_pending_registrations.description: GET /api/admin/pending-registrations returns pending list with count=0

P2_habits.description: GET /api/habits/ returns habits list with day_of_week filtering

P2_fraud_warnings.description: GET /api/habits/my-warnings returns warnings array, active_warning, rejection_count structure

P2_team_system.description: GET /api/referrals/my-team returns team array with stats (total=1, active=0, in_danger=0, new_this_week=0)

P2_forum_merge.description: POST /api/forum/posts/merge validates inputs correctly (returns 404 for invalid IDs)

P2_forum_text_search.description: GET /api/forum/posts?search=test uses text index for 3+ char queries

P2_admin_habits_crud.description: POST /api/admin/habits with day_of_week and requires_screenshot creates correctly

frontend_store_page.description: Store page shows 3 immunity items (1-Day, 3-Day, 7-Day), points balance (429), active immunity status, purchase buttons

frontend_team_page.description: My Team page shows 4 stat cards (Total Members, Active This Week, In Danger, New This Week) and team member list

frontend_admin_dashboard.description: Admin Dashboard shows Total Members=5, cleanup alert banner (3 Pending Proofs), Admin Cleanup quick action

frontend_admin_cleanup.description: Admin Cleanup page shows 5 stat cards: Pending Proofs(3), Fraud Warnings(0), In Danger(0), Auto-Suspended(0), Pending Signups(0)

frontend_forum_tabs.description: Forum page shows Open/Solved/All tabs with Open as default (4 open, 2 solved posts)

frontend_admin_members.description: Admin Members page shows 4 stat cards: Total Active Members(5), Team Leaders(1), Suspended Users(1), In Danger(0)

frontend_referral_tree_visual.description: Referral Tree Visual view has off-white/cream readable background with D3 tree visualization

frontend_sidebar_links.description: Sidebar shows all required links: Store, My Team, My Rewards, Leaderboard, Community Forum, AI Assistant, Admin Dashboard

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 187 FINAL comprehensive test passed. All P0-P2 features verified working: Login, complete-onboarding, rewards streaks, referral tree, store system (3 immunity items, purchase with points deduction, active credits), admin cleanup (refactored routes), forum tabs/merge/text-search, habits with day_of_week and requires_screenshot, fraud warnings, my-team system, pending-registrations. Admin has 429 reward points (reduced from 729 after purchases). Store shows active immunity. Forum merge uses OpenRouter API (graceful fallback to concatenation). _validate_merin_code in referral_routes.py is MOCKED. AI visual review and AI forum merge use OpenRouter API (graceful degradation if unavailable).
mocked_api_note: _validate_merin_code in referral_routes.py is MOCKED (as noted from previous iterations). AI visual review and AI forum merge use OpenRouter API with graceful fallback.
